items.caption: A collection of four retro-style cocktail hour labels, each with a distinct color scheme and design, reminiscent of the 1950s. the top left features a pastel pink background with a green cocktail glass, a yellow cocktail shaker, and a red and white striped umbrella. the top right showcases a vibrant red background with a green palm tree, a blue cocktail glass, and a yellow cocktail shaker. the bottom left presents a blue background with a black cocktail glass, a red cocktail shaker, and a green cocktail glass with a yellow umbrella. the bottom right displays a yellow background with a black cocktail glass, a red cocktail shaker, and a black silhouette of a woman holding a cocktail glass. each label prominently displays the text "cocktail hour" in a stylized font.
